name: Year in Review: 2024
description: The biggest news, sports, and pop-culture moments of 2024.

questions.q: Who won the 2024 U.S. presidential election?

source.notes: First non-consecutive second term since Grover Cleveland (1893).

questions.q: Who became the Democratic nominee for the 2024 U.S. presidential election after Joe Biden withdrew?

source.notes: Biden withdrew July 21, 2024.

questions.q: Which city hosted the 2024 Summer Olympic Games?

source.notes: July 26 - August 11, 2024.

questions.q: Which country topped the 2024 Paris Olympics medal table?

source.notes: USA and China tied at 40 gold medals; USA had more total medals.

questions.q: Which gymnast won her second Olympic individual all-around gold in Paris 2024?

source.notes: Biles also won gold on vault and team final, plus floor silver.

questions.q: Which 2024 film won Best Picture at the 96th Academy Awards (March 2024)?

source.notes: Christopher Nolan also won Best Director; Cillian Murphy Best Actor.

questions.q: Which country won the 2024 ICC Men's T20 Cricket World Cup?

source.notes: Beat South Africa in final.

questions.q: Which country won the 2024 UEFA European Football Championship (Euro 2024)?

source.notes: Beat England 2-1 in the final, hosted in Germany.

questions.q: Which country won the 2024 Copa América?

source.notes: Beat Colombia 1-0; hosted by the United States.

questions.q: Which Kendrick Lamar diss track aimed at Drake reached #1 on the Billboard Hot 100 in 2024?

source.notes: Released May 4, 2024.

questions.q: Which celestial event drew massive media coverage across North America on April 8, 2024?
choices: Total solar eclipse over North America

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: rewrote nonsense stem ('Mexican wax-cylindery breakthrough'). Path of totality crossed Mexico, the U.S. (TX to ME), and Canada.

questions.q: Which Baltimore bridge collapsed in March 2024 after a container ship hit it?

source.notes: Cargo ship MV Dali lost power and struck the bridge on March 26, 2024.

questions.q: Which historic figure shocked the world by being assassinated at a campaign rally in July 2024?

source.notes: Trump survived an attempted assassination at a Butler, PA rally on July 13, 2024.

questions.q: Which Caribbean hurricane became the earliest Cat-5 Atlantic storm on record in July 2024?

source.notes: Reached Cat 5 on July 1, 2024.

questions.q: Which devastating Atlantic hurricane killed over 200 in the southeastern U.S. in late September 2024?

source.notes: Particularly devastated western North Carolina.

questions.q: Which militant political organization's leader Ismail Haniyeh was assassinated in Tehran in July 2024?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: Hamas is not a country; rephrased to 'militant political organization'. Haniyeh was Hamas political bureau chief; killed July 31, 2024 in Tehran.

questions.q: Which Hezbollah Secretary-General was killed by Israeli airstrikes in Beirut in September 2024?

source.notes: Killed September 27, 2024.

questions.q: Which dictator was toppled in Syria in December 2024 after rebel forces took Damascus?

source.notes: Fled to Russia after a rapid HTS-led offensive in late November/early December 2024.

questions.q: Which Boeing aircraft model became infamous in early 2024 after a door panel blew off mid-flight on Alaska Airlines?

source.notes: Alaska Flight 1282, January 5, 2024 — door plug blew off at altitude.

questions.q: Which UnitedHealthcare CEO was shot dead in Manhattan in December 2024?

source.notes: Shot December 4, 2024 outside the Hilton midtown hotel.
